- Confirmed `H2CClient` destructured `connect` from `clientOpts` but omitted it from the options passed to `Client`.
- Added temporary regression tests verifying:
  - custom `connect` functions are used
  - invalid `connect` values are rejected
- Verified those tests failed before the fix.
- Fixed `lib/dispatcher/h2c-client.js` by passing `connect` through to `super(...)`.
- Verified the temporary tests passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary test changes as requested.
- Ran the existing `test/h2c-client.js` suite successfully.

Final validation:
- `node --test test/h2c-client.js` passes: 7/7 tests.
